articles.title: DON'T FOLLOW FRAMEWORKS. BREAK THEM
articles.summary: Frameworks are helpful, but product work is rarely linear. The best teams adapt and remix them to fit messy, real-world situations.

articles.title: LEADERSHIP CO-PROCESSING WITH LLMS
articles.summary: LLMs can supercharge engineering leadership by acting as research assistants, thought partners, and executive coaches. Used creatively, they help managers think clearly, make better decisions, and lead more effectively.

articles.title: THE STRATEGIC PRODUCT MANAGER PATH HIDING IN PLAIN SIGHT
articles.summary: Strategic product managers drive impact behind the scenes - connecting teams, simplifying complexity, and shaping direction without owning a roadmap. Their influence comes from systems thinking, cross-functional clarity, and spotting problems early.

articles.title: VIBE ANALYSIS
articles.summary: AI is reshaping data work by automating technical tasks and making analysis faster and more accessible. Human judgment still matters, but analysis is about to get twice as efficient and far more powerful.

articles.title: 12 HEURISTICS FOR CONTENT DESIGN
articles.summary: Most design heuristics lack clarity, inclusivity, or testability. This updated set of 12 content heuristics focuses on clarity, accessibility, ethics, and usefulness - offering actionable, user-centered ways to improve digital content.

articles.title: NEVER START WITH 100%
articles.summary: Modern release strategies minimize downtime and user impact by shifting from big bang launches to controlled rollouts. Approaches like Blue-Green, Canary, and Guarded Releases enable safer, incremental deployment and faster recovery.

articles.title: 3 BOARDS AND NEW WAYS TO SPARK YOUR NEXT GROWTH MOVE
articles.summary: Visual fluency is key across product roles, with no-code tools enabling rapid prototyping. Stay inspired by curating references, joining communities, and embedding discovery into team culture to spark new ideas and growth.

articles.title: THE MAKING OF DARIO AMODEI
articles.summary: Driven by his father's death from a once-incurable disease, Dario Amodei leads Anthropic with urgency - pushing rapid, safe AI development that's redefining industry norms and global dynamics.

articles.title: HOW TO EXPAND YOUR INFLUENCE SKILLS
articles.summary: True influence comes from emotional intelligence, not just logic.

articles.title: AI AND THE DISCIPLINE OF ATTENTION
articles.summary: AI's real risk is losing our ability to choose, commit, and focus.
